div.p: hą̈mɔ̨ yakapo'ɔ̨ = ‎‎I want to see you; I want you to come you is fem. here
u´wį yakapo'į = I want to see you (masc.)
uwį uhpoaniaka = I want to see him
hi´nimɔ̨ 'e´yu = your arm (pl. fem.) or masc.
aha´ hi´ctih'a´ni = I'm going that way
'i´mą hihpo´ǫ 'ic´ɛpa = I love you; I'm glad when I see you
ta´ri'i´ckuni = house - walls, walls of a house

tr.td: a crack is open, spread apart
a crack is open, spread apart

div.p: tiratawuk´ų´ = cloth to wear; maybe shirt
says he thinks they need to call the Atakapa that.
se´hiti ta´la me´'uwakahtca = tomorrow he's going to get cane
se´hiti ta´la me´wikahtca = tomorrow he's going to get cane
